sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69082" key="mu/kh2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μύκη</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], ὁ</foreign> or <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n69082.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μύκης</ref> </xr> (q.v.). </sense> <sense n="II" id="n69082.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μύκη· ἡ θήκη</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
